problem: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary?
mechanism: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing
hypothesis: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Fear. Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
